title: languas oblongifolia
intro: Languas oblongifolia, also known as Kaempferia galanga, is a type of ginger plant native to Southeast Asia and commonly used in traditional medicine. It has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Languas oblongifolia include reducing fever, alleviating nausea, and treating digestive issues due to its carminative and antiemetic properties. In herbal preparations, Languas oblongifolia is often used in the form of oil, juice, or dried roots, and is commonly combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
